extras.title: 表示“完成”的动词
extras.content: accomplish:指成功地完成预期的计划、任务等 achieve:指完成伟大功业

extras.title: 表示“禁止,阻止”多用~ ... from doing sth.的结构,常见动词有:
extras.content: discourage hinder inhibit preclude prevent prohibit

senses.example: Are you content to be a person who will never accomplish anything?
senses.example_zh: 你甘心做一个永远一事无成的人吗？

derivatives: accomplished a. 实现的;有造诣的
accomplishment n. 实现;成就;造诣

senses.example: The child is frustrated by the problems that are hard to solve.
senses.example_zh: 孩子被太难解决的问题弄得很沮丧。

senses.def_en: to prevent sb.'s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
senses.example: The bad weather frustrated our hopes of going out.
senses.example_zh: 恶劣的天气使我们外出的愿望无法实现。

senses.def_en: to cause sth. to be unable to continue in the normal way
senses.example: The heavy storm has disrupted telephone service.

senses.def_en: to make sb. less determined or hopeful
senses.example: Don't let one failure discourage you.
senses.example_zh: 不要因为一次失败就气馁。

senses.def_en: to try to prevent by expressing disapproval or raising objections
senses.example: I tried to discourage him from going alone.
senses.example_zh: 我设法劝他不要独自去。

entries.mnemonic: en(into)+tail(切割)→使负责切割→使承担

senses.def_en: to involve sth. as a necessary part or result
senses.example: The construction of the Three Gorges Project entails large migration.
